response.justification: The candidate has extensive full-stack software development experience and strong proficiency in various languages and technologies, but lacks direct experience in hardware architecture, AI accelerators, or performance optimization for deep-learning workloads. Their background is heavily skewed toward web/mobile development and embedded systems, with no clear evidence of work on SoC/IP modeling, GPU architecture, or hardware-software co-design required for this role.
strengths: Strong full-stack software development experience across multiple domains (web, mobile, embedded, cloud)
Proven ability to work with high-performance computing (e.g., low-latency apps, real-time systems)
Experience with system architecture and hardware-software integration in embedded contexts
concerns: No demonstrated experience with SoC/IP modeling, AI accelerator hardware, or GPU architecture
Lacks direct exposure to deep-learning workload optimization or performance bottlenecks in hardware
Educational background (BS in CS) does not meet the minimum qualifications (PhD/Master's required) and years of relevant experience are unclear for this specialized role
